features.name: Ephemeral
features.description: The wisp can't wear or carry anything.

features.name: Illumination
features.description: The wisp sheds Bright Light in a 20-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 20 feet.

features.name: Incorporeal Movement
features.description: The wisp can move through other creatures and objects as if they were Difficult Terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) Force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

actions.name: Shock
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 11 (2d8 + 2) Lightning damage.

bonus_actions.name: Consume Life
bonus_actions.description: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 10, one living creature the wisp can see within 5 feet that has 0 Hit Points. Failure: The target dies, and the wisp regains 10 (3d6) Hit Points.

bonus_actions.name: Vanish
bonus_actions.description: The wisp and its light have the Invisible condition until the wisp's Concentration ends on this effect, which ends early immediately after the wisp makes an attack roll or uses Consume Life.

weaknesses: Vulnerable to force damage when phasing
tactical_info.tactics: Uses invisibility to scout and position. Hit-and-run tactics with shock attacks. Feeds on dying enemies with consume life. Nearly untouchable due to high AC and resistances.
